up.method: Reported csSRR from Table 2 (range 88-129 fmol/cell/day over exponential phase); = cell-specific dissimilatory sulfate uptake
20 mM lactate, sole electron donor, incompletely oxidized to acetate; no per-cell lactate rate tabulated

sec.method: Colorimetric sulfide assay; up to 7.8 mM SumH2S accumulated; 1:1 with sulfate reduced so per-cell sulfide production = csSRR
Stoichiometric end product (2 lactate + SO4 -> 2 acetate + 2 HCO3 + HS + H+, Table 1); not directly quantified

mfa.note: Stoichiometry (Table 1): 2 CH3CH(OH)COO- + SO4 2- -> 2 CH3COO- + 2 HCO3- + HS- + H+; drG'0.90 = -193.5 kJ/mol

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. fructosovorans Lactate 2,200 ... k 1.09 +/- 0.22 ... Y 8.5 +/- 2.9 ... csSRR 129 +/- 34 ... SumH2S up to 7.8 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 2. Specific growth rate k reported in day-1; max k=1.09 day-1 -> mu=1.09/24=0.0454 h-1; doubling time=ln2/1.09=0.636 day=15.3 h (calculated). csSRR (cell-specific sulfate reduction rate) 88-129 fmol/cell/day = sulfate uptake per cell (also equals sulfide production per cell, 1:1). Yield 8.5-10.2 x10^6 cells/umol SO4. Room temperature (~22 C). PO4=0.30 g/L KH2PO4 (~2200 uM, non-limiting). Rates are per-cell, not per gDW.

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to 3.8 mM SumH2S

mfa.note: 4 CH3COCOO- + SO4 2- -> 4 CH3COO- + 4 HCO3- + HS- + 3H+; drG'0.90 = -379.8 kJ/mol

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. fructosovorans Pyruvate 2,200 ... k 0.96 +/- 0.12 ... Y up to 29.7 ... csSRR 30-46 ... SumH2S up to 3.8 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 2. Max k=0.96 day-1 -> mu=0.040 h-1; td=ln2/0.96=0.722 day=17.3 h. csSRR 30-46 fmol/cell/day. Yield 14.9-29.7 x10^6 cells/umol SO4 (highest cell yield of the substrates). 40 mM pyruvate, non-P-limited.

up.method: Table 2 range 18-76 fmol/cell/day (peak 76.3 early, 18-22 later exponential)

sec.method: Colorimetric assay; up to 4.1 mM SumH2S

mfa.note: C6H12O6 + SO4 2- -> 2 CH3COO- + 2 HCO3- + HS- + 3H+; drG'0.90 = -391.7 kJ/mol

growth_records.cite: Zaarur S et al. Influence of Phosphorus and Cell Geometry on the Fractionation of Sulfur Isotopes by Several Species of Desulfovibrio during Microbial Sulfate Reduction. Frontiers in Microbiology (2017). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2017.00890. [PMC5447228]
growth_records.snippet: D. fructosovorans Fructose 2,200 ... k 1.54 +/- 0.22 ... Y up to 76.3 ... csSRR 18-22 (peak 76.3) ... SumH2S up to 4.1 mM.
growth_records.notes: Table 2. Max k=1.54 day-1 -> mu=0.0642 h-1; td=ln2/1.54=0.450 day=10.8 h. csSRR 18-76 fmol/cell/day. Highest cell yield 50-76 x10^6 cells/umol SO4. 10 mM fructose, non-P-limited.
